title: SR 20-21: Joint Statement on Bank Secrecy Act Due Diligence Requirements for Customers Who May Be Considered Politically Exposed Persons
title_normalized: Joint Statement on Bank Secrecy Act Due Diligence Requirements for Customers Who May Be Considered Politically Exposed Persons

issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
applicability_raw: This guidance applies to all financial institutions supervised by the Federal Reserve that are subject to the Bank Secrecy Act.

bm25_text: SR 20-21 Joint Statement on Bank Secrecy Act Due Diligence Requirements for Customers Who May Be Considered Politically Exposed Persons This guidance applies to all financial institutions supervised by the Federal Reserve that are subject to the Bank Secrecy Act.
